sections.name: Hero
sections.image_prompt: A warm, hopeful illustration of a Korean elderly veteran walking into a modern local hospital with family. Korean flag motif subtly in background. Government blue (#003478) and red (#C8102E) color accents. Clean, modern Korean government poster style. 16:9 ratio. Bright morning sunlight.

sections.name: Before/After
sections.image_prompt_before: Illustration of an elderly Korean man looking tired, standing at a distant large hospital (veterans hospital) far from his home. Long red dotted line on a map showing the far distance. Gray muted tones. Worried expression. Korean city background.
sections.image_prompt_after: Illustration of the same elderly Korean man smiling, walking into a nearby neighborhood hospital close to his home. Short green path on map. Bright colors, spring flowers, warm sunshine. Relieved and happy expression.

sections.name: Policy Overview
sections.image_prompt: Clean infographic showing numbers 49 transforming to 140 with dynamic upward arrow. Hospital icons multiplying. Pie chart showing breakdown: 47 tertiary hospitals (blue), 5 veterans hospitals (red), 86 commissioned hospitals (green), 2 others (gray). White background, flat design, Korean government report style.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.image_prompt: 3-step horizontal flowchart infographic. Step 1: Phone icon with 'Confirm eligibility at local veterans office'. Step 2: Hospital building icon with 'Visit nearby hospital for diagnosis certificate'. Step 3: Document with checkmark icon with 'Veterans Review Board assessment'. Arrows connecting steps. Blue gradient (#003478). Clean flat design. Include 'Physical Exam PASS' stamp on step 3.

sections.name: Benefits
sections.image_prompt: Set of 5 circular benefit icons: (1) House+Hospital proximity icon, (2) Clock+checkmark time-saving icon, (3) Simplified document icon, (4) Korea map with pins icon, (5) Balance scale (fairness) icon. Blue monochrome (#003478) flat design. Also a comparison bar chart showing before vs after accessibility improvement.

sections.name: Hospital Map
sections.image_prompt: Map of South Korea with 140 hospital location pins. Blue pins for tertiary hospitals, red pins for veterans hospitals, green pins for commissioned hospitals. Seoul metropolitan area inset/zoom. Clean vector style. Legend included. Regional statistics bar graph on the side.
sections.javascript: Regional hospital accordion toggle + hospital search filter

sections.name: Target Audience
sections.image_prompt: Two-column card layout infographic. Left card (green border): Checkmark icons with eligible target list. Right card (gray border): X-mark icons with ineligible list. Clean card design with subtle shadows. Government official style.

sections.name: Required Documents
sections.image_prompt: Medical clipboard with checklist illustration. Diagnosis certificate and medical opinion forms neatly organized. Stethoscope and pen beside. Clean, professional medical illustration style. Blue (#003478) tone.

sections.name: CTA
sections.image_prompt: Warm blue gradient background banner. Large phone icon with '1577-0606' number prominently displayed. National Veterans Affairs logo. Korean flag and Mugunghwa (hibiscus) motif. Sunrise symbolizing bright future. Warm and official government poster style. 16:9 ratio.

bottom_cta_bar.behavior: hidden in hero section, visible after scroll

animations.cta_pulse: keyframes pulse — scale 1 to 1.02, 2s infinite ease-in-out
animations.counter_animation: 49 → 140 숫자 카운팅 애니메이션 on scroll into view

images.strategy: AI 생성 이미지 프롬프트 기반 — 각 섹션별 image_prompt 필드 참조
images.fallback: CSS gradient placeholders with descriptive text overlay

style_guide.illustration_style: 따뜻하고 신뢰감 있는 한국 정부 공식 일러스트 스타일
style_guide.infographic_style: 깔끔한 플랫 디자인, 큰 텍스트, 명확한 대비
style_guide.target_readability: 고령자(70대 이상)도 인식 가능한 큰 아이콘과 텍스트

accessibility.touch_targets: min 48px height on all interactive elements
